description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent rectangular screen area and a control panel equipped with multiple round buttons and joysticks. The cabinet is primarily finished in a gradient of light green to cream, with the word 'treehouse' displayed on the marquee at the top. The side panels are adorned with a stylized frog or gecko foot logo inside a hexagon, adding a playful and modern touch. The front lower section includes a coin slot mechanism, two red buttons, and access panels, typical of traditional arcade machines. The back of the cabinet is plain, with visible ventilation slots and access screws. The overall build appears sturdy, likely constructed from wood or MDF with a laminate finish, and accented with plastic and metal components for the controls and coin mechanism.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with a green gradient finish, 'treehouse' marquee, and a control panel featuring multiple buttons and joysticks. Side panels display a stylized frog or gecko foot logo inside a hexagon.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'treehouse' marquee, screen, control panel with buttons and joysticks, and coin slot area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the green gradient finish and the large hexagonal frog or gecko foot logo.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain back panel with ventilation slots and access screws.
description_view_3: Right side view, mirroring the left, with the same green gradient and hexagonal logo.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and six round buttons, all arranged in a horizontal row, with a black control panel and cream-colored controls.
attribute_marquee_artwork: The marquee features the word 'treehouse' in lowercase gray letters on a cream background, with a simple and modern style.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large hexagonal logo with a stylized frog or gecko foot in white on a green gradient background.
